author: doll-agent
content:
Already implemented. Every API the issue lists exists in ferray-stats:
- unique (searching.rs:40) plus unique_values, unique_counts, unique_inverse.
- searchsorted and searchsorted_with_sorter (sorting.rs:393, 417).
- in1d (set_ops.rs:249).
- intersect1d, union1d, setdiff1d (set_ops.rs:91/36/137).

Re-exported from ferray meta-crate. Python bindings exist for unique, searchsorted, in1d, unique_extended.

Closing as already-resolved.
